chain.thought: Explanation: Counting the location entries, there are 8 stations in Milan (rows 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 11, 20, 27) and 11 stations in Rome (rows 1, 7, 12, 13, 14, 16, 17, 18, 21, 22, 26). Therefore, there are more radio stations in Rome.
